users.description: Premium subscriber personal profiles and credentials meta

fields.uid: string - unique auth key identifying the user
fields.name: string - displaying full name

deliverables.description: AI Workspace processed deliverables containing study guides, emails, and briefs

fields.inputText: string - raw text index or prompt material
fields.deliverableType: string - report, email, study_notes, outline, briefing
fields.qualityScores: map - calculated metric values (readability, clarity, completeness, professionalism)
fields.productivityInsights: map - time savings, found deadlines, decisions, and action keys
fields.file: map - optional uploaded file data (name, types, base64 data)

history.description: Historical log entries of generated deliverables for tracing and user feed tracking

fields.id: string - unique identifier for the history entry
fields.deliverableId: string - id of the corresponding deliverable
fields.name: string - user display name
fields.deliverableType: string - e.g. email, report, meeting_minutes, study_notes
fields.generatedOutput: string - primary or professional format output
fields.inputText: string - input prompt or text source
